title: AMV
wikitext:
Anime Music Videos. A popular pastime of gaijin (i.e., non-Japanese) anime geeks is editing together video from one or many anime to go along with a song. The resultant monster is an AMV, and making these things is an art in and of itself. Evangelion music videos are extremely commonplace, but only a few are truly great.  


==Evangelion Opus==
Creator: ShonenDizzyCow

Song: Queen "Bohemian Rhapsody"

[http://www.animemusicvideos.org/members/members_videoinfo.php?v=759/ animemusicvideos link]

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XWIPt8U106A/ youtube link]

A match made in AMV heaven -- with editing to boot. Only gets better the more familiar with Eva the viewer becomes. As much a masterpiece in its field as both of its source materials. 

==Engel==
Creator: Kevin Caldwell

Song: Rammstein "Engel"

[http://www.animemusicvideos.org/members/members_videoinfo.php?v=35122/ animemusicvideos link]

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PVQaixvlMwo/ youtube link]

Features [[Asuka]] as the (German) male vocals and an entirely hilarious selection of the cast as the female chorus. Highly recommended.

==Zweite Existenz==
Creator: Requeitt

Song: Muse "Thoughts of a Dying Atheist"

[http://www.animemusicvideos.org/members/members_videoinfo.php?v=113772/ animemusicvideos link]

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6IQWR0akfFQ/ youtube link]

==A Beautiful Failure of a Film==
Creator: Studio Echo

Song: Guster "Airport Song"

[http://www.animemusicvideos.org/members/members_videoinfo.php?v=21648/ animemusicvideos link]

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gn5Nd8WYDok/ youtube link]

==I Can Feel You==
Creator: Digitalex

Song: Lustral "Everytime" (Mike Koglin Remix)

[http://www.animemusicvideos.org/members/members_videoinfo.php?v=79722/ animemusicvideos link]

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U-2Bv3iLrYM/ youtube link]

==Nightmare==
Creator: Black Sun Productions

Song:A Perfect Circle "Counting Bodies Lke Sheep To The Rhythm Of The War Drums"

[http://www.animemusicvideos.org/members/members_videoinfo.php?v=85570/ animemusicvideos link]

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7_y8G8dAnn8&playnext=1&list=PL8F255BC81D7D2ECC/ youtube link]

==Faithless==
Creator: HurQlez03

Song: Linkin Park "Numb"

[http://www.animemusicvideos.org/members/members_videoinfo.php?v=33427/ animemusicvideos link]

[http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQVbpE4jVZg&feature=fvst/ youtube link]

==External links==
Go to [http://www.animemusicvideos.org/home/home.php| animemusicvideos.org] for more info (along with tons of shiznat to download).
[[Category:Fandom]]

Anime Music Videos. A popular pastime of gaijin (i.e., non-Japanese) anime geeks is editing together video from one or many anime to go along with a song. The resultant monster is an AMV, and making these things is an art in and of itself. Evangelion music videos are extremely commonplace, but only a few are truly great.


Contents

  • 1 Evangelion Opus
  • 2 Engel
  • 3 Zweite Existenz
  • 4 A Beautiful Failure of a Film

  • 6 Nightmare
  • 7 Faithless
  • 8 External links
